title: Hồi đó tao học giỏi nhất mà

thumbnail.hook: HỒI ĐÓ TAO GIỎI NHẤT MÀ
thumbnail.subhook: Nó cười khẽ. Tôi không biết nói gì.

ctaText: Follow để đọc nhanh 1 cuốn / ngày 📚

styleBible.protagonist: the same young Vietnamese man in his late 20s, wearing a plain charcoal-grey shirt, quiet observer expression — he is the narrator, not the two subjects of the story; appears in a few reflective moments only
styleBible.style: moody nostalgic illustration, deep navy and warm gold palette (library-at-dusk lighting), painterly soft-focus grain, cinematic composition with clear negative space, subtle vignette, slight film-photograph feel
styleBible.avoid: no photorealism, no text/letters/logos in image, no 3D render, no harsh shadows, no cartoonish exaggeration

imageStyle: moody nostalgic illustration, deep navy and warm gold palette, painterly grain, 9:16 vertical, no text

captions.text: Hồi cấp ba, thằng bạn ngồi cạnh tôi học giỏi nhất khối.
Thầy cô cưng, ba mẹ nó nở mày nở mặt.
Ai cũng nghĩ sau này nó làm ông này bà nọ.
Ra trường, nó vô một công ty ngon, lương cao hơn cả bọn.
Mà được hơn năm thì nghỉ.
Cứ vài tháng lại đổi một chỗ.
Có bữa đi nhậu, nó kể, giọng đầy bực:
sếp thì dốt, đồng nghiệp toàn thứ nịnh bợ, tụi nó ganh ghét vì nó giỏi.
Chỗ nào nó cũng kể y như vậy.
Còn một thằng khác — hồi đó học làng nhàng, thi rớt lên rớt xuống.
Giờ nó mở cái xưởng gỗ nhỏ, nuôi hơn chục thợ.
Ai kẹt tiền nó cho ứng trước, đứa nào ốm nó chạy tới thăm.
Tết rồi hai đứa tình cờ gặp nhau ở một đám cưới.
Thằng học giỏi vẫn đang thất nghiệp, ngồi than thời buổi.
Thằng học dở thì điện thoại reo liên tục, thợ gọi hỏi công chuyện.
Lúc ra về, nó vỗ vai tôi, cười khẽ:

scenes.prompt: A high-school classroom at dusk in Vietnam, an empty top-of-class seat by the window with an open notebook of neat handwriting and a stack of medals beside it, warm gold light streaming through window blinds, deep navy shadows across empty desks, painterly grain, nostalgic memory feel

A proud Vietnamese teacher hands a certificate to a top-ranked high-school boy at a graduation-style ceremony, his parents smiling in the front row, warm gold stage light and confetti mid-air, deep navy audience shadows behind, painterly grain, moment of pride

A young Vietnamese man in his mid-20s, plain white dress shirt, packing personal items into a cardboard box at his corporate office desk, an empty chair reflecting on a glass partition, warm gold desk lamp against deep navy office corridor, painterly grain, quiet resignation

A young Vietnamese man in his mid-20s in a plain white shirt, sitting slouched at a Vietnamese street beer stall at night, half-full glass in hand, brow furrowed as he complains, other patrons at nearby tables tuned out and looking down at phones, warm gold sodium streetlight, deep navy shadows around

A different young Vietnamese man in his mid-20s, worn denim jacket sleeves rolled up, stands smiling in the doorway of a small wooden Vietnamese carpentry workshop lit by warm gold late-afternoon sun, a dozen carpenters at their benches turning to greet him, wood shavings on the floor, painterly grain, sense of belonging

The same young Vietnamese man in worn denim jacket, sitting on a low stool next to an ailing older carpenter's cot, handing him a paper packet with quiet care, warm gold lantern light in a modest Vietnamese home, deep navy shadows in the background, painterly grain, humane concern

Two Vietnamese men in their late 20s standing awkwardly at the edge of a Vietnamese wedding banquet — one in a slightly wrinkled office shirt looking tired and holding an empty glass, the other in a simple work shirt with phone pressed to ear mid-conversation, warm gold string-light banquet glow, deep navy edges, painterly grain, quiet contrast

Two silhouettes of Vietnamese men parting ways after a wedding, one placing a hand on the other's shoulder in the doorway of a lit banquet hall, warm gold light spilling from behind, cold navy Vietnamese street outside stretching away into deep shadow, painterly grain, quiet finality

scenes.quote: Hồi đó tao học giỏi nhất mà ha.
